fixture_notice: Independently authored synthetic ClinicalTrials.gov API-shaped fixture. No real study or participant data.

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Age 18 years or older
* eGFR \>50 mL/min/1.73m2
  measured within 30 days

Exclusion Criteria:

1. Active bleeding
2. Stroke within the previous 6 months
